source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race in the setDDLLabelForDiagnosis
source_pr.body:

symptoms: ddl: fix data race in the setDDLLabelForDiagnosis
failure_signature: ddl: fix data race in the setDDLLabelForDiagnosis
root_cause_explanation: `setDDLLabelForDiagnosis` mutates job context state used for diagnosis. The previous logic could call `ctx.setDDLLabelForDiagnosis(job)` outside the initialization path, which risks concurrent access to shared job context state and triggers race detector failures. The patch fixes the race by only setting the DDL label when the job context is first created and inserted into `jobCtxMap` (move the call into the `!exists` branch), and enables `-race` for `ddl_test`.
fix_pattern: ddl: fix data race in the setDDLLabelForDiagnosis

evidence: evidence: ddl: fix data race in the setDDLLabelForDiagnosis
files: ddl/BUILD.bazel, ddl/ddl.go, executor/BUILD.bazel, store/driver/txn/BUILD.bazel, telemetry/BUILD.bazel
